司令官……こちらが、お父様が書いた、わたしの仕様書です。<br>存在自体、すっか:
Commander... this is the spec sheet my father wrote for me. I'd
completely forgotten it existed.
翌日、そう言ってウェンディが差し出してきたのは、<br>彼女のすべての機能につい:
The next day, saying that, Wendy handed me her specification
sheet—a document detailing all her functions.
それによれば、ウェンディが突然変貌したのは、彼女の体内に備えられた、<br>性行:
Per the spec sheet, Wendy's sudden transformation seemed due to a
'special magic furnace' within her that activates only during sex.
お父様は、わたしに好きな人ができた場合を考え、<br>わたしの体に“女性的な機能:
My father, apparently anticipating I might fall in love, equipped my
body with 'feminine functions' and a 'special magic furnace.'
女性的な機能を持つことで、<br>わたしは、好きな相手と体を重ねることができ……:
By having these feminine functions, I can share my body with the one
I love...
さらに、特殊魔導炉を起動させることにより、わたしと相手に、<br>特別な性的快感:
Furthermore, according to my father, activating the special magic
furnace allows me to provide special pleasure for both me and my partner.
ウェンディの父……娘の幸福を願う人格者か、<br>はたまた単なるエロオヤジなのか:
Wendy's father... a man of character who wishes for his daughter's
happiness? Or simply a dirty old man...
いずれにしろ、不安に怯えていたウェンディに、<br>明るい笑顔を取り戻させたのだ:
Either way, he brought back Wendy's bright smile when she was
scared and anxious, so I'm sure he's a good 'father'.
